internships.description: Worked on frontend development using React.js for web applications.
responsibilities: Developed responsive user interfaces using React.js
Integrated REST APIs with frontend components
Collaborated with the team using Git workflows
internships.learning: Built a strong foundation in React.js, component-based development, API integration, and collaborative software development.

internships.description: Contributed to the development of BizArt by working on backend APIs and application features under the guidance of senior engineers.
responsibilities: Assisted in developing REST APIs using Node.js, Express.js, and MongoDB
Implemented backend features and resolved application bugs
Worked with JWT authentication and MongoDB
Participated in API integration, testing, and code reviews
Worked in an Agile development environment
internships.learning: Gained hands-on experience in backend development, REST APIs, authentication, database design, Git workflows, and collaborative software engineering.

internships.description: Developing backend services for BizArt, a creator platform with messaging, portfolios, media management, and marketplace functionality.
responsibilities: Developing REST APIs using Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js, and MongoDB
Building media upload, notification, and user management APIs
Integrating backend services with React Native applications
Assisting with backend architecture and cloud deployment activities
internships.learning: Expanding expertise in backend architecture, scalable API development, cloud deployment, and production software engineering.

overallExperience: Professional experience in frontend, backend, and full-stack development through internships and a full-time backend engineering role, with a focus on Node.js, TypeScript, Express.js, MongoDB, cloud technologies, and DevOps.
